/*transferMapper.getRcpCustNotOpenList*/
SELECT A.REQUEST_KEY AS requestKey , A.SCAN_ID AS scanId , A.RES_NO AS resNo , TO_CHAR(A.REQ_IN_DAY, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS reqInDay , CASE WHEN PSTATE = '20' AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM MSP_JUO_CUS_INFO WHERE CUSTOMER_SSN = TRIM(B.CSTMR_NATIVE_RRN)) AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM MCP_REQUEST@DL_MCP WHERE SCAN_ID = A.SCAN_ID AND REQUEST_STATE_CODE = '21') THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS delYn FROM MCP_REQUEST@DL_MCP A , MCP_REQUEST_CSTMR@DL_MCP B WHERE A.REQUEST_KEY = B.REQUEST_KEY AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM MSP_REQUEST WHERE REQUEST_KEY = A.REQUEST_KEY ) AND A.CONTRACT_NUM IS NULL AND A.REQ_IN_DAY < SYSDATE - #{stdrCnt} AND ROWNUM <= 10000
mapper.insert: /*transferMapper.insertMcpRequest*/ INSERT INTO MCP_REQUEST@DL_CAN ( REQUEST_KEY, MANAGER_CODE, AGENT_CODE, SERVICE_TYPE, OPER_TYPE, CSTMR_TYPE, RES_CODE, RES_MSG, RES_NO, CLAUSE_PRI_COLLECT_FLAG, CLAUSE_PRI_OFFER_FLAG, CLAUSE_ESS_COLLECT_FLAG, CLAUSE_PRI_TRUST_FLAG, CLAUSE_PRI_AD_FLAG, CLAUSE_CONFIDENCE_FLAG, ONLINE_AUTH_TYPE, ONLINE_AUTH_INFO, PSTATE, REQUEST_STATE_CODE, OPEN_NO, FILE01, FILE01_MASK, FAXYN, FAXNUM, SCAN_ID, ON_OFF_TYPE, RIP, OPEN_REQ_DATE, SYS_RDATE, REQ_WANT_NUMBER, REQ_WANT_NUMBER2, REQ_WANT_NUMBER3, REQ_BUY_TYPE, REQ_MODEL_NAME, REQ_MODEL_COLOR, REQ_PHONE_SN, REQ_USIM_SN, REQ_PAY_TYPE, REQ_ADDITION, SHOP_CD, APP_FORM_YN, REQ_IN_DAY, CONTRACT_NUM, ETC_SPECIAL, REQ_USIM_NAME, PHONE_PAYMENT, REQ_ADDITION_PRICE, APP_FORM_XML_YN, SPC_CODE, CNTPNT_SHOP_ID, SHOP_USM_ID, MEMO, REC_YN, OPEN_MARKET_REFERER, SO_CD, NW_BLCK_AGRM_YN, APP_BLCK_AGRM_YN, APP_CD, SO_TRNS_AGRM_YN, CLAUSE_JEHU_FLAG, SHOP_NM, PROD_ID, CRET_ID, BANNER_CD, SNTY_COLOR_CD, SNTY_CAPAC_CD, PROD_TYPE, CLAUSE_RENTAL_MODEL_CP, CLAUSE_RENTAL_MODEL_CP_PR, CLAUSE_RENTAL_SERVICE, CLAUSE_MPPS35_FLAG, CLAUSE_FINANCE_FLAG, TRANSFER_DTTM, REAL_SHOP_NM, USIM_KINDS_CD ) SELECT REQUEST_KEY, MANAGER_CODE, AGENT_CODE, SERVICE_TYPE, OPER_TYPE, CSTMR_TYPE, RES_CODE, RES_MSG, RES_NO, CLAUSE_PRI_COLLECT_FLAG, CLAUSE_PRI_OFFER_FLAG, CLAUSE_ESS_COLLECT_FLAG, CLAUSE_PRI_TRUST_FLAG, CLAUSE_PRI_AD_FLAG, CLAUSE_CONFIDENCE_FLAG, ONLINE_AUTH_TYPE, ONLINE_AUTH_INFO, PSTATE, REQUEST_STATE_CODE, OPEN_NO, FILE01, FILE01_MASK, FAXYN, FAXNUM, SCAN_ID, ON_OFF_TYPE, RIP, OPEN_REQ_DATE, SYS_RDATE, REQ_WANT_NUMBER, REQ_WANT_NUMBER2, REQ_WANT_NUMBER3, REQ_BUY_TYPE, REQ_MODEL_NAME, REQ_MODEL_COLOR, REQ_PHONE_SN, REQ_USIM_SN, REQ_PAY_TYPE, REQ_ADDITION, SHOP_CD, /*transferMapper.insertMcpRequestAgent*/ INSERT INTO MCP_REQUEST_AGENT@DL_CAN ( REQUEST_KEY, MINOR_AGENT_NAME, MINOR_AGENT_RRN, MINOR_AGENT_TEL_FN, MINOR_AGENT_TEL_MN, MINOR_AGENT_TEL_RN, MINOR_AGENT_RELATION, JRDCL_AGENT_NAME, JRDCL_AGENT_RRN, JRDCL_AGENT_TEL_FN, JRDCL_AGENT_TEL_MN, JRDCL_AGENT_TEL_RN, ENTRUST_REQ_NM, ENTRUST_RES_NM, ENTRUST_REQ_RELATION, ENTRUST_RES_RRN, ENTRUST_RES_TEL_FN, ENTRUST_RES_TEL_MN, ENTRUST_RES_TEL_RN, SYS_RDATE, MINOR_SELF_INQRY_AGRM_YN, MINOR_SELF_CERT_TYPE, MINOR_SELF_ISSU_EXPR_DT, MINOR_SELF_ISSU_NUM ) SELECT REQUEST_KEY, MINOR_AGENT_NAME, MINOR_AGENT_RRN, MINOR_AGENT_TEL_FN, MINOR_AGENT_TEL_MN, MINOR_AGENT_TEL_RN, MINOR_AGENT_RELATION, JRDCL_AGENT_NAME, JRDCL_AGENT_RRN, JRDCL_AGENT_TEL_FN, JRDCL_AGENT_TEL_MN, JRDCL_AGENT_TEL_RN, ENTRUST_REQ_NM, ENTRUST_RES_NM, ENTRUST_REQ_RELATION, ENTRUST_RES_RRN, ENTRUST_RES_TEL_FN, ENTRUST_RES_TEL_MN, ENTRUST_RES_TEL_RN, SYS_RDATE, MINOR_SELF_INQRY_AGRM_YN, MINOR_SELF_CERT_TYPE, MINOR_SELF_ISSU_EXPR_DT, MINOR_SELF_ISSU_NUM FROM MCP_REQUEST_AGENT@DL_MCP WHERE REQUEST_KEY = #{requestKey}

/*transferMapper.insertMcpRequestChange*/ INSERT INTO MCP_REQUEST_CHANGE@DL_CAN ( NAME_CHANGE_NM, NAME_CHANGE_TEL_FN, NAME_CHANGE_TEL_MN, NAME_CHANGE_TEL_RN, NAME_CHANGE_RRN, NAME_CHANGE_PINSTALLMENT, REQUEST_KEY, SYS_RDATE ) SELECT NAME_CHANGE_NM, NAME_CHANGE_TEL_FN, NAME_CHANGE_TEL_MN, NAME_CHANGE_TEL_RN, NAME_CHANGE_RRN, NAME_CHANGE_PINSTALLMENT, REQUEST_KEY, SYS_RDATE FROM MCP_REQUEST_CHANGE@DL_MCP WHERE REQUEST_KEY = #{requestKey}

/*transferMapper.insertMcpRequestCstmr*/ INSERT INTO MCP_REQUEST_CSTMR@DL_CAN ( REQUEST_KEY, CSTMR_FOREIGNER_NATION, CSTMR_FOREIGNER_PN, CSTMR_FOREIGNER_RRN, CSTMR_FOREIGNER_SDATE, CSTMR_FOREIGNER_EDATE, CSTMR_PRIVATE_CNAME, CSTMR_PRIVATE_NUMBER, CSTMR_JURIDICAL_CNAME, CSTMR_JURIDICAL_RRN, CSTMR_JURIDICAL_NUMBER, CSTMR_TEL_FN, CSTMR_TEL_MN, CSTMR_TEL_RN, CSTMR_MOBILE_FN, CSTMR_MOBILE_MN, CSTMR_MOBILE_RN, CSTMR_POST, CSTMR_ADDR, CSTMR_ADDR_DTL, CSTMR_ADDR_BJD, CSTMR_BILL_SEND_CODE, CSTMR_MAIL, CSTMR_MAIL_RECEIVE_FLAG, CSTMR_VISIT_TYPE, CSTMR_RECEIVE_TEL_FN, CSTMR_RECEIVE_TEL_NM, CSTMR_RECEIVE_TEL_RN, OTHERS_PAYMENT_AG, OTHERS_PAYMENT_NM, OTHERS_PAYMENT_RRN, OTHERS_PAYMENT_RELATION, OTHERS_PAYMENT_RNM, SYS_RDATE, CSTMR_NAME, CSTMR_NATIVE_RRN, CSTMR_FOREIGNER_DOD, CSTMR_FOREIGNER_BIRTH, SELF_INQRY_AGRM_YN, SELF_CERT_TYPE, SELF_ISSU_EXPR_DT, SELF_ISSU_NUM, CSTMR_JEJU_ID, SELF_CSTMR_CI, RECOMMEND_FLAG_CD, RECOMMEND_INFO ) SELECT REQUEST_KEY, CSTMR_FOREIGNER_NATION, CSTMR_FOREIGNER_PN, CSTMR_FOREIGNER_RRN, CSTMR_FOREIGNER_SDATE, CSTMR_FOREIGNER_EDATE, CSTMR_PRIVATE_CNAME, CSTMR_PRIVATE_NUMBER, CSTMR_JURIDICAL_CNAME, CSTMR_JURIDICAL_RRN, CSTMR_JURIDICAL_NUMBER, CSTMR_TEL_FN, CSTMR_TEL_MN, CSTMR_TEL_RN, CSTMR_MOBILE_FN, CSTMR_MOBILE_MN, CSTMR_MOBILE_RN, CSTMR_POST, CSTMR_ADDR, CSTMR_ADDR_DTL, CSTMR_ADDR_BJD, CSTMR_BILL_SEND_CODE, CSTMR_MAIL, CSTMR_MAIL_RECEIVE_FLAG, CSTMR_VISIT_TYPE, CSTMR_RECEIVE_TEL_FN, CSTMR_RECEIVE_TEL_NM, CSTMR_RECEIVE_TEL_RN, OTHERS_PAYMENT_AG, OTHERS_PAYMENT_NM, OTHERS_PAYMENT_RRN, OTHERS_PAYMENT_RELATION, OTHERS_PAYMENT_RNM, SYS_RDATE, CSTMR_NAME, CSTMR_NATIVE_RRN, CSTMR_FOREIGNER_DOD, CSTMR_FOREIGNER_BIRTH, SELF_INQRY_AGRM_YN, SELF_CERT_TYPE, SELF_ISSU_EXPR_DT, SELF_ISSU_NUM, CSTMR_JEJU_ID, SELF_CSTMR_CI, RECOMMEND_FLAG_CD, RECOMMEND_INFO FROM MCP_REQUEST_CSTMR@DL_MCP WHERE REQUEST_KEY = #{requestKey}

/*transferMapper.insertMcpRequestDlvry*/ INSERT INTO MCP_REQUEST_DLVRY@DL_CAN ( REQUEST_KEY, DLVRY_NAME, DLVRY_TEL_FN, DLVRY_TEL_MN, DLVRY_TEL_RN, DLVRY_MOBILE_FN, DLVRY_MOBILE_MN, DLVRY_MOBILE_RN, DLVRY_POST, DLVRY_ADDR, DLVRY_ADDR_DTL, DLVRY_ADDR_BJD, DLVRY_MEMO, SYS_RDATE, TB_CD ) SELECT REQUEST_KEY, DLVRY_NAME, DLVRY_TEL_FN, DLVRY_TEL_MN, DLVRY_TEL_RN, DLVRY_MOBILE_FN, DLVRY_MOBILE_MN, DLVRY_MOBILE_RN, DLVRY_POST, DLVRY_ADDR, DLVRY_ADDR_DTL, DLVRY_ADDR_BJD, DLVRY_MEMO, SYS_RDATE, TB_CD FROM MCP_REQUEST_DLVRY@DL_MCP WHERE REQUEST_KEY = #{requestKey}

/*transferMapper.insertMcpRequestMove*/ INSERT INTO MCP_REQUEST_MOVE@DL_CAN ( REQUEST_KEY, MOVE_COMPANY, MOVE_MOBILE_FN, MOVE_MOBILE_MN, MOVE_MOBILE_RN, MOVE_AUTH_TYPE, MOVE_AUTH_NUMBER, MOVE_THISMONTH_PAY_TYPE, MOVE_ALLOTMENT_STAT, MOVE_REFUND_AGREE_FLAG, SYS_RDATE, REQ_GUIDE_FLAG, REQ_GUIDE_FN, REQ_GUIDE_RN, REQ_GUIDE_MN ) SELECT REQUEST_KEY, MOVE_COMPANY, MOVE_MOBILE_FN, MOVE_MOBILE_MN, MOVE_MOBILE_RN, MOVE_AUTH_TYPE, MOVE_AUTH_NUMBER, MOVE_THISMONTH_PAY_TYPE, MOVE_ALLOTMENT_STAT, MOVE_REFUND_AGREE_FLAG, SYS_RDATE, REQ_GUIDE_FLAG, REQ_GUIDE_FN, REQ_GUIDE_RN, REQ_GUIDE_MN FROM MCP_REQUEST_MOVE@DL_MCP WHERE REQUEST_KEY = #{requestKey}

/*transferMapper.insertMcpRequestPayment*/ INSERT INTO MCP_REQUEST_PAYMENT@DL_CAN ( REQUEST_KEY, REQ_AC_TYPE, REQ_AC01_BALANCE, REQ_AC02_DAY, REQ_AC01_AMOUNT, REQ_AC02_AMOUNT, SYS_RDATE ) SELECT REQUEST_KEY, REQ_AC_TYPE, REQ_AC01_BALANCE, REQ_AC02_DAY, REQ_AC01_AMOUNT, REQ_AC02_AMOUNT, SYS_RDATE FROM MCP_REQUEST_PAYMENT@DL_MCP WHERE REQUEST_KEY = #{requestKey}

/*transferMapper.insertMcpRequestReq*/ INSERT INTO MCP_REQUEST_REQ@DL_CAN ( REQUEST_KEY, REQ_BANK, REQ_ACCOUNT_NAME, REQ_ACCOUNT_RRN, REQ_ACCOUNT_RELATION, REQ_ACCOUNT_NUMBER, REQ_CARD_NAME, REQ_CARD_RRN, REQ_CARD_COMPANY, REQ_CARD_NO, REQ_CARD_YY, REQ_CARD_MM, REQ_WIRE_TYPE, SYS_RDATE, REQ_PAY_OTHER_FLAG, REQ_PAY_OTHER_TEL_FN, REQ_PAY_OTHER_TEL_MN, REQ_PAY_OTHER_TEL_RN ) SELECT REQUEST_KEY, REQ_BANK, REQ_ACCOUNT_NAME, REQ_ACCOUNT_RRN, REQ_ACCOUNT_RELATION, REQ_ACCOUNT_NUMBER, REQ_CARD_NAME, REQ_CARD_RRN, REQ_CARD_COMPANY, REQ_CARD_NO, REQ_CARD_YY, REQ_CARD_MM, REQ_WIRE_TYPE, SYS_RDATE, REQ_PAY_OTHER_FLAG, REQ_PAY_OTHER_TEL_FN, REQ_PAY_OTHER_TEL_MN, REQ_PAY_OTHER_TEL_RN FROM MCP_REQUEST_REQ@DL_MCP WHERE REQUEST_KEY = #{requestKey}

/*transferMapper.insertMcpRequestSaleinfo*/ INSERT INTO MCP_REQUEST_SALEINFO@DL_CAN ( MODEL_ID, REQUEST_KEY, MODEL_MONTHLY, MODEL_INSTALLMENT, MODEL_SALE_POLICY_CODE, MODEL_PRICE_VAT, RECYCLE_YN, MODEL_DISCOUNT1, MODEL_DISCOUNT2, ENGG_MNTH_CNT, SOC_CODE, USIM_PRICE_TYPE, JOIN_PRICE_TYPE, JOIN_PRICE, USIM_PRICE, MODEL_PRICE, ADDTION_SERVICE, ADDTION_SERVICE_SUM, MODEL_DISCOUNT3, USIM_PAY_MTHD_CD, JOIN_PAY_MTHD_CD, REAL_MDL_INSTAMT, SPRT_TP, MAX_DISCOUNT3, DC_AMT, ADD_DC_AMT, SETTL_WAY_CD, SETTL_AMT, SETTL_APV_NO, SETTL_TRA_NO, OWN_PERSONAL_CODE, RENTAL_BASE_AMT, RENTAL_BASE_DC_AMT, RENTAL_MODEL_CP_AMT ) SELECT MODEL_ID, REQUEST_KEY, MODEL_MONTHLY, MODEL_INSTALLMENT, MODEL_SALE_POLICY_CODE, MODEL_PRICE_VAT, RECYCLE_YN, MODEL_DISCOUNT1, MODEL_DISCOUNT2, ENGG_MNTH_CNT, SOC_CODE, USIM_PRICE_TYPE, JOIN_PRICE_TYPE, JOIN_PRICE, USIM_PRICE, MODEL_PRICE, ADDTION_SERVICE, ADDTION_SERVICE_SUM, MODEL_DISCOUNT3, USIM_PAY_MTHD_CD, JOIN_PAY_MTHD_CD, REAL_MDL_INSTAMT, SPRT_TP, MAX_DISCOUNT3, DC_AMT, ADD_DC_AMT, SETTL_WAY_CD, SETTL_AMT, SETTL_APV_NO, SETTL_TRA_NO, OWN_PERSONAL_CODE, RENTAL_BASE_AMT, RENTAL_BASE_DC_AMT, RENTAL_MODEL_CP_AMT FROM MCP_REQUEST_SALEINFO@DL_MCP WHERE REQUEST_KEY = #{requestKey}

/*transferMapper.insertMcpRequestState*/ INSERT INTO MCP_REQUEST_STATE@DL_CAN ( REQUEST_STATE_KEY, REQUEST_STATE_CODE, DLVRY_NO, OPEN_NO, MEMO, SYS_RDATE, RIP, RID, VIEW_FLAG, RES_NO, REQUEST_KEY, TB_CD ) SELECT REQUEST_STATE_KEY, REQUEST_STATE_CODE, DLVRY_NO, OPEN_NO, MEMO, SYS_RDATE, RIP, RID, VIEW_FLAG, RES_NO, REQUEST_KEY, TB_CD FROM MCP_REQUEST_STATE@DL_MCP WHERE REQUEST_KEY = #{requestKey}

/*transferMapper.insertEmvScanMst*/ INSERT INTO EMV_SCAN_MST@DL_CAN ( SCAN_ID, WORK_ID, AGENCY_ID, COMPANY_ID, CUST_NM, C_MEMO, SCAN_FILE_CNT, DOC_TITLE, DOC_STATUS, DEL_REASON, USE_YN, RGST_DT, RGST_PRSN_ID, MDFY_DT, MDFY_PRSN_ID, ONLINE_YN, PROC_PRSN_ID, PROC_DTTM, PROC_STAT_CD ) SELECT SCAN_ID, WORK_ID, AGENCY_ID, COMPANY_ID, CUST_NM, C_MEMO, SCAN_FILE_CNT, DOC_TITLE, DOC_STATUS, DEL_REASON, USE_YN, RGST_DT, RGST_PRSN_ID, MDFY_DT, MDFY_PRSN_ID, ONLINE_YN, PROC_PRSN_ID, PROC_DTTM, PROC_STAT_CD FROM EMV_SCAN_MST@DL_MCP A WHERE SCAN_ID = #{scanId} AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM EMV_SCAN_MST@DL_CAN WHERE SCAN_ID = A.SCAN_ID )

/*transferMapper.insertEmvScanFile*/ INSERT INTO EMV_SCAN_FILE@DL_CAN ( FILE_ID, SCAN_ID, FILE_NUMBER, FILE_SIZE, FILE_EXT, DOC_ID, MAIN_DOC_CD, USE_YN, ORIGIN_DIR, SAVE_DIR, RGST_DT, RGST_PRSN_ID, MDFY_DT, MDFY_PRSN_ID, BANK_CD, BANK_CD_NO, CONTRACT_NUM ) SELECT FILE_ID, SCAN_ID, FILE_NUMBER, FILE_SIZE, FILE_EXT, DOC_ID, MAIN_DOC_CD, USE_YN, ORIGIN_DIR, SAVE_DIR, RGST_DT, RGST_PRSN_ID, MDFY_DT, MDFY_PRSN_ID, BANK_CD, BANK_CD_NO, CONTRACT_NUM FROM EMV_SCAN_FILE@DL_MCP A WHERE SCAN_ID = #{scanId} AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM EMV_SCAN_FILE@DL_CAN WHERE SCAN_ID = A.SCAN_ID )
mapper.select:
/*transferMapper.getTmntCntrList*/
SELECT CONTRACT_NUM AS contractNum , CUSTOMER_ID AS customerId , BAN AS ban , SVC_CNTR_NO AS svcCntrNo , SUBSCRIBER_NO AS subscriberNo FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO WHERE SUB_STATUS = 'C' AND TO_DATE(SUBSTR(SUB_STATUS_DATE, 1, 8), 'YYYYMMDD') = TRUNC(SYSDATE) - #{stdrCnt} AND TRNS_YN IS NULL AND ROWNUM <= #{targetCnt} UNION ALL SELECT CONTRACT_NUM AS contractNum , CUSTOMER_ID AS customerId , BAN AS ban , SVC_CNTR_NO AS svcCntrNo , SUBSCRIBER_NO AS subscriberNo FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO WHERE SUB_STATUS = 'C' AND TO_DATE(SUBSTR(SUB_STATUS_DATE, 1, 8), 'YYYYMMDD') < TRUNC(SYSDATE) - #{stdrCnt} AND TRNS_YN IS NULL AND ROWNUM <= (SELECT ETC1 FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST WHERE GRP_ID = 'DEV0003' AND CD_VAL = 'CAN_TRANS_CNT') - #{targetCnt}

/*transferMapper.getTmntCntrListCnt*/
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO WHERE SUB_STATUS = 'C' AND TO_DATE(SUBSTR(SUB_STATUS_DATE, 1, 8), 'YYYYMMDD') = TRUNC(SYSDATE) - #{stdrCnt} AND TRNS_YN IS NULL AND ROWNUM <= 120

/*transferMapper.getUnpayAmtCheck*/ SELECT A.BILL_YM as billYm , A.UNPAY_AMNT as unpayAmnt , A.EQIST_PYMN_AMNT as equistPymnAmnt , ( SELECT SUM(MAX(INST_ORGIN_AMNT)) FROM MSP_JUO_ADD_INFO WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = #{contractNum} AND MODEL_CHN_CD IN ('39', '01') AND NVL(INST_ORGIN_AMNT, 0) > 0 GROUP BY GRNT_INSR_MNGM_NO ) AS instOrignAmnt FROM ( SELECT SUM(DECODE(A.PYMN_CD, 'INV', ( A.PYMN_AMNT + A.VAT_AMNT ) /*청구*/ , 'ADJ', ( A.PYMN_AMNT + A.VAT_AMNT )*-1 /*조정*/ , 'ADJR', ( A.PYMN_AMNT + A.VAT_AMNT ) /*조정취소*/ , 'PYM', ( A.PYMN_AMNT + A.VAT_AMNT )*-1 /*수납*/ , 'BCK', ( A.PYMN_AMNT + A.VAT_AMNT ) /*수납취소*/ , 'RFNR', ( A.PYMN_AMNT + A.VAT_AMNT )*-1 /*환불취소*/ , 'RFN', ( A.PYMN_AMNT + A.VAT_AMNT ) /*환불*/ , 'FNTT', ( A.PYMN_AMNT + A.VAT_AMNT )*-1 /*자금이전*/ , 'FNTF', ( A.PYMN_AMNT + A.VAT_AMNT ) /*자금이전취소*/ )) AS UNPAY_AMNT , MAX(BILL_YM) AS BILL_YM , SUM(CASE WHEN A.BILL_ITEM_CD IN ('EQIST','EQISV') AND PYMN_CD IN ('PYM', 'ADJ') THEN PYMN_AMNT ELSE 0 END) AS EQIST_PYMN_AMNT FROM CLS_BILL_PYMN_DATA A WHERE A.SVC_CNTR_NO = #{svcCntrNo} ) A
mapper.insert: /*transferMapper.insertMspRequest*/ INSERT INTO MSP_REQUEST@DL_CAN ( REQUEST_KEY, CONTRACT_NUM, SCAN_ID, RES_NO, AGENT_CODE, MANAGER_CODE, SERVICE_TYPE, OPER_TYPE, CSTMR_TYPE, RES_CODE, CONTRACT_NUM, SCAN_ID, RES_NO, AGENT_CODE, MANAGER_CODE, SERVICE_TYPE, OPER_TYPE, CSTMR_TYPE, RES_CODE, RES_MSG, CLAUSE_PRI_COLLECT_FLAG, CLAUSE_PRI_OFFER_FLAG, CLAUSE_ESS_COLLECT_FLAG, APP_FORM_XML_YN, OPEN_REQ_DATE, ETC_SPECIAL, PHONE_PAYMENT, REQ_ADDITION_PRICE, REQ_USIM_NAME, SPC_CODE, CNTPNT_SHOP_ID, SHOP_USM_ID, MEMO, REC_YN, OPEN_MARKET_REFERER, SO_CD, NW_BLCK_AGRM_YN, APP_BLCK_AGRM_YN, APP_CD, CLAUSE_JEHU_FLAG, SHOP_NM, PROD_ID, CRET_ID, BANNER_CD, SNTY_COLOR_CD, SNTY_CAPAC_CD, PROD_TYPE, CLAUSE_RENTAL_MODEL_CP, CLAUSE_RENTAL_MODEL_CP_PR, CLAUSE_RENTAL_SERVICE, CLAUSE_MPPS35_FLAG, CLAUSE_FINANCE_FLAG, SYSDATE, REAL_SHOP_NM, USIM_KINDS_CD FROM MSP_REQUEST A WHERE REQUEST_KEY = #{requestKey} AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM MSP_REQUEST@DL_CAN WHERE REQUEST_KEY = A.REQUEST_KEY )

/*transferMapper.insertMspJuoBanInfo*/ INSERT INTO MSP_JUO_BAN_INFO@DL_CAN ( BAN, CUSTOMER_ID, COL_DELINQ_STATUS, MARKET_GUBUN, BL_BILLING_METHOD, BL_SPCL_BAN_CODE, BANK_ACCT_HOLDER_ID, BAN_ADR_ZIP, BAN_ADR_PRIMARY_LN, BAN_ADR_SECONDARY_LN, BAN_LINK_NAME, EVNT_CD, EVNT_TRTM_NO, EVNT_TRTM_DT ) SELECT BAN, CUSTOMER_ID, COL_DELINQ_STATUS, MARKET_GUBUN, BL_BILLING_METHOD, BL_SPCL_BAN_CODE, BANK_ACCT_HOLDER_ID, BAN_ADR_ZIP, BAN_ADR_PRIMARY_LN, BAN_ADR_SECONDARY_LN, BAN_LINK_NAME, EVNT_CD, EVNT_TRTM_NO, EVNT_TRTM_DT FROM MSP_JUO_BAN_INFO A WHERE BAN = #{ban} AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM MSP_JUO_BAN_INFO@DL_CAN WHERE BAN = A.BAN )

/*transferMapper.insertMspJuoBanInfoHist*/ INSERT INTO MSP_JUO_BAN_INFO_HIST@DL_CAN ( BAN, EVNT_CHANGE_DATE, EVNT_TRTM_DT, CUSTOMER_ID, COL_DELINQ_STATUS, MARKET_GUBUN, BL_BILLING_METHOD, BL_SPCL_BAN_CODE, BANK_ACCT_HOLDER_ID, BAN_ADR_ZIP, BAN_ADR_PRIMARY_LN, BAN_ADR_SECONDARY_LN, BAN_LINK_NAME, EVNT_CD, EVNT_TRTM_NO ) SELECT BAN, EVNT_CHANGE_DATE, EVNT_TRTM_DT, CUSTOMER_ID, COL_DELINQ_STATUS, MARKET_GUBUN, BL_BILLING_METHOD, BL_SPCL_BAN_CODE, BANK_ACCT_HOLDER_ID, BAN_ADR_ZIP, BAN_ADR_PRIMARY_LN, BAN_ADR_SECONDARY_LN, BAN_LINK_NAME, EVNT_CD, EVNT_TRTM_NO FROM MSP_JUO_BAN_INFO_HIST A WHERE BAN = #{ban} AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM MSP_JUO_BAN_INFO_HIST@DL_CAN WHERE BAN = A.BAN )
mapper.update:
/*tranferMapper.updateMspRequestMove*/ UPDATE MSP_REQUEST_MOVE SET MOVE_MOBILE_FN = CASE WHEN MOVE_MOBILE_FN IS NOT NULL THEN '000' ELSE '' END , MOVE_MOBILE_MN = CASE WHEN MOVE_MOBILE_MN IS NOT NULL THEN '0000' ELSE '' END , MOVE_MOBILE_RN = CASE WHEN MOVE_MOBILE_RN IS NOT NULL THEN '0000' ELSE '' END
, REQ_GUIDE_FN = CASE WHEN REQ_GUIDE_FN IS NOT NULL THEN '000' ELSE '' END , REQ_GUIDE_RN = CASE WHEN REQ_GUIDE_RN IS NOT NULL THEN '0000' ELSE '' END , REQ_GUIDE_MN = CASE WHEN REQ_GUIDE_MN IS NOT NULL THEN '0000' ELSE '' END WHERE REQUEST_KEY = #{requestKey}

/*tranferMapper.updateMspJuoSubInfo*/ UPDATE MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO SET SUBSCRIBER_NO = '00000000000' , USER_SSN = CASE WHEN USER_SSN IS NOT NULL THEN CRYPTO_AES256.ENC_AES(SUBSTR(CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES(USER_SSN), 1, 7) || '******') ELSE '' END , SUB_ADR_PRIMARY_LN = SUBSTR(SUB_ADR_PRIMARY_LN,1,15) , SUB_ADR_SECONDARY_LN = '' , SUB_LINK_NAME = CASE WHEN SUB_LINK_NAME IS NOT NULL THEN '이관고객' ELSE '' END , LGL_AGNT_SSN = CASE WHEN LGL_AGNT_SSN IS NOT NULL THEN CRYPTO_AES256.ENC_AES(SUBSTR(CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES(LGL_AGNT_SSN), 1, 7) || '******') ELSE '' END , AUX_LGL_AGNT_SSN = CASE WHEN AUX_LGL_AGNT_SSN IS NOT NULL THEN CRYPTO_AES256.ENC_AES(SUBSTR(CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES(AUX_LGL_AGNT_SSN), 1, 7) || '******') ELSE '' END , LGL_AGNT_NM = CASE WHEN LGL_AGNT_NM IS NOT NULL THEN '이관고객' ELSE '' END , LGL_AGNT_NO = '00000000000' , TRNS_YN = 'Y' WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = #{contractNum}

/*tranferMapper.updateMspJuoSubInfoHist*/ UPDATE MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO_HIST SET SUBSCRIBER_NO = '00000000000' , USER_SSN = CASE WHEN USER_SSN IS NOT NULL THEN CRYPTO_AES256.ENC_AES(SUBSTR(CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES(USER_SSN), 1, 7) || '******') ELSE '' END , SUB_ADR_PRIMARY_LN = SUBSTR(SUB_ADR_PRIMARY_LN,1,15) , SUB_ADR_SECONDARY_LN = '' , SUB_LINK_NAME = CASE WHEN SUB_LINK_NAME IS NOT NULL THEN '이관고객' ELSE '' END , LGL_AGNT_SSN = CASE WHEN LGL_AGNT_SSN IS NOT NULL THEN CRYPTO_AES256.ENC_AES(SUBSTR(CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES(LGL_AGNT_SSN), 1, 7) || '******') ELSE '' END , AUX_LGL_AGNT_SSN = CASE WHEN AUX_LGL_AGNT_SSN IS NOT NULL THEN CRYPTO_AES256.ENC_AES(SUBSTR(CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES(AUX_LGL_AGNT_SSN), 1, 7) || '******') ELSE '' END , LGL_AGNT_NM = CASE WHEN LGL_AGNT_NM IS NOT NULL THEN '이관고객' ELSE '' END , LGL_AGNT_NO = '00000000000' WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = #{contractNum}

/*tranferMapper.updateMspJuoCusInfo*/ UPDATE MSP_JUO_CUS_INFO SET CUSTOMER_SSN = CASE WHEN CUSTOMER_SSN IS NOT NULL THEN CRYPTO_AES256.ENC_AES(SUBSTR(CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES(CUSTOMER_SSN), 1, 7) || '******') ELSE '' END , DRIVR_LICNS_NO = '' , TAX_ID = '' , CUSTOMER_ADR_PRIMARY_LN = SUBSTR(CUSTOMER_ADR_PRIMARY_LN,1,15) , CUSTOMER_ADR_SECONDARY_LN = '' , CUSTOMER_LINK_NAME = CASE WHEN CUSTOMER_LINK_NAME IS NOT NULL THEN '이관고객' ELSE '' END , PREV_CUSTOMER_SSN = CASE WHEN PREV_CUSTOMER_SSN IS NOT NULL THEN CRYPTO_AES256.ENC_AES(SUBSTR(CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES(PREV_CUSTOMER_SSN), 1, 7) || '******') ELSE '' END , PREV_CUSTOMER_NAME = CASE WHEN PREV_CUSTOMER_NAME IS NOT NULL THEN '이관고객' ELSE '' END WHERE CUSTOMER_ID = #{customerId}

/*tranferMapper.updateMspJuoCusInfoHist*/ UPDATE MSP_JUO_CUS_INFO_HIST SET CUSTOMER_SSN = CASE WHEN CUSTOMER_SSN IS NOT NULL THEN CRYPTO_AES256.ENC_AES(SUBSTR(CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES(CUSTOMER_SSN), 1, 7) || '******') ELSE '' END , DRIVR_LICNS_NO = '' , TAX_ID = '' , CUSTOMER_ADR_PRIMARY_LN = SUBSTR(CUSTOMER_ADR_PRIMARY_LN,1,15) , CUSTOMER_ADR_SECONDARY_LN = '' , CUSTOMER_LINK_NAME = CASE WHEN CUSTOMER_LINK_NAME IS NOT NULL THEN '이관고객' ELSE '' END , PREV_CUSTOMER_SSN = CASE WHEN PREV_CUSTOMER_SSN IS NOT NULL THEN CRYPTO_AES256.ENC_AES(SUBSTR(CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES(PREV_CUSTOMER_SSN), 1, 7) || '******') ELSE '' END , PREV_CUSTOMER_NAME = CASE WHEN PREV_CUSTOMER_NAME IS NOT NULL THEN '이관고객' ELSE '' END WHERE CUSTOMER_ID = #{customerId}

/*tranferMapper.updateMspJuoBanInfo*/ UPDATE MSP_JUO_BAN_INFO SET BANK_ACCT_HOLDER_ID = CASE WHEN BANK_ACCT_HOLDER_ID IS NOT NULL THEN CRYPTO_AES256.ENC_AES(SUBSTR(CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES(BANK_ACCT_HOLDER_ID), 1, 7) || '******') ELSE '' END ,BAN_ADR_PRIMARY_LN = SUBSTR(BAN_ADR_PRIMARY_LN,1,15) , BAN_ADR_SECONDARY_LN = '' , BAN_LINK_NAME = CASE WHEN BAN_LINK_NAME IS NOT NULL THEN '이관고객' ELSE '' END
WHERE BAN = #{ban}

/*tranferMapper.updateMspJuoBanInfoHist*/ UPDATE MSP_JUO_BAN_INFO_HIST SET BANK_ACCT_HOLDER_ID = CASE WHEN BANK_ACCT_HOLDER_ID IS NOT NULL THEN CRYPTO_AES256.ENC_AES(SUBSTR(CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES(BANK_ACCT_HOLDER_ID), 1, 7) || '******') ELSE '' END , BAN_ADR_PRIMARY_LN = SUBSTR(BAN_ADR_PRIMARY_LN,1,15) , BAN_ADR_SECONDARY_LN = '' , BAN_LINK_NAME = CASE WHEN BAN_LINK_NAME IS NOT NULL THEN '이관고객' ELSE '' END WHERE BAN = #{ban}
mapper.select:
/*transferMapper.getTmntCustDataList*/
SELECT A.CONTRACT_NUM as contractNum , A.CUSTOMER_ID as customerId , A.BAN as ban , A.SVC_CNTR_NO as svcCntrNo , A.SUBSCRIBER_NO as subscriberNo FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO@DL_CAN A WHERE TO_DATE(SUBSTR(A.SUB_STATUS_DATE, 1, 8), 'YYYYMMDD') < SYSDATE - #{stdrCnt}
mapper.delete:
/*transferMapper.deleteCommDatPrvTxn*/
DELETE FROM MSP_COMM_DAT_PRV_TXN WHERE APY_DT < SYSDATE - #{stdrCnt}

/*transferMapper.deleteInvstReqMst*/
DELETE FROM MSP_INVST_REQ_MST WHERE TO_DATE(PROC_DT, 'YYYYMMDD') < SYSDATE - #{stdrCnt}
mapper.select: /*transferMapper.selectSellUsimTransferList*/ SELECT SELL_USIM_KEY AS sellUsimKey FROM MCP_SELL_USIM@DL_MCP WHERE VDATE_END IS NOT NULL AND VDATE_END < TO_CHAR(SYSDATE - #{stdrCnt}, 'YYYYMMDD') AND ROWNUM <= 10000
mapper.insert: /*transferMapper.insertMcpSellUsim*/ INSERT INTO MCP_SELL_USIM@DL_CAN( SELL_USIM_KEY, USIM_NO, FRGNR_NAME, FRGNR_RN, FILE_NAME, FILE_MASK, RIP, SYS_RDATE, PSTATE, FRGNR_PN, UIP, SYS_UDATE, MOBILE_FN, MOBILE_MN, MOBILE_RN, MAIL, VDATE_START, VDATE_END, LANG_TYPE, SSTATE, AGENT_ID, ETC_FILE_NAME, ETC_FILE_MASK, FILE_ENC_FLAG, RCG_AUTO_AMT, END_USR_ID, END_DT, CONTRACT_NUM, RCG_SEQ, REMARK, DEL_YN, DEL_DTTM) SELECT SELL_USIM_KEY, USIM_NO, FRGNR_NAME, FRGNR_RN, FILE_NAME, FILE_MASK, RIP, SYS_RDATE, PSTATE, FRGNR_PN, UIP, SYS_UDATE, MOBILE_FN, MOBILE_MN, MOBILE_RN, MAIL, VDATE_START, VDATE_END, LANG_TYPE, SSTATE, AGENT_ID, ETC_FILE_NAME, ETC_FILE_MASK, FILE_ENC_FLAG, RCG_AUTO_AMT, END_USR_ID, END_DT, CONTRACT_NUM, RCG_SEQ, REMARK, DEL_YN, DEL_DTTM FROM MCP_SELL_USIM@DL_MCP WHERE SELL_USIM_KEY = #{sellUsimKey}
mapper.delete: /*transferMapper.deleteMcpUser*/ DELETE FROM MCP_USER@DL_CAN WHERE STATUS = '1' AND AUTH_CODE = 'USER_ROLE' AND USER_DIVISION = '00' AND TO_DATE(SYS_LDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') < TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, -72),'YYYYMMDD'), 'YYYY-MM-DD')
mapper.insert: /*transferMapper.insertMcpRecUser*/ INSERT INTO MCP_REC_USER@DL_CAN (USERID, PASSWORD, NAME, AUTH_CODE, PIN, EMAIL, POST, ADDRESS, ADDRESS_DTL, MOBILE_NO, CONTACT_NO, BIRTHDAY, GENDER, SYS_RDATE, SYS_UDATE, SYS_LDATE, LOGIN_COUNT, STATUS, CUST_NUM, AUTH_KEY, USER_DIVISION, EMAIL_CODE, ADDRESS_BJD, REVOCATION_DATE, WITHD_CODE,WITHD_DESC) SELECT USERID, PASSWORD, NAME, AUTH_CODE, PIN, EMAIL, POST, ADDRESS, ADDRESS_DTL, MOBILE_NO, CONTACT_NO, BIRTHDAY, GENDER, SYS_RDATE, SYS_UDATE, SYS_LDATE, LOGIN_COUNT, STATUS, CUST_NUM, AUTH_KEY, USER_DIVISION, EMAIL_CODE, ADDRESS_BJD, REVOCATION_DATE, WITHD_CODE,WITHD_DESC FROM MCP_REC_USER@DL_MCP A WHERE 1=1 AND A.REVOCATION_DATE < TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, -6),'YYYYMMDD'), 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM MCP_REC_USER@DL_CAN WHERE USERID = A.USERID)
mapper.delete: /*transferMapper.deleteMcpRecUser*/ DELETE FROM MCP_REC_USER@DL_MCP WHERE 1=1 AND REVOCATION_DATE < TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, -6),'YYYYMMDD'), 'YYYY-MM-DD')
/*transferMapper.deleteMcpRecUserCan*/ DELETE FROM MCP_REC_USER@DL_CAN WHERE 1=1 AND REVOCATION_DATE < TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, -60),'YYYYMMDD'), 'YYYY-MM-DD')
mapper.update: /*transferMapper.updateIntmInsrMember*/ UPDATE MSP_INTM_INSR_MEMBER SET CTN = '00000000000', CUST_NM = '해지고객' WHERE INSR_STAT_CD = '2' AND CTN != '00000000000' AND TRUNC(SYSDATE) - #{stdrCnt} > TRUNC(TO_DATE(END_DTTM, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'))

/*transferMapper.updateIntmInsrIfOut*/ UPDATE MSP_INTM_INSR_IF_OUT SET CTN = '00000000000', CUST_NM = '해지고객', BAN_ADDR = NULL, MINOR_AGENT_NAME = NULL WHERE INSR_MEMBER_NUM IN ( SELECT INSR_MEMBER_NUM FROM MSP_INTM_INSR_MEMBER WHERE INSR_STAT_CD = '2' AND CTN != '00000000000' AND TRUNC(SYSDATE) - #{stdrCnt} > TRUNC(TO_DATE(END_DTTM, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS')) )

/*transferMapper.updateIntmInsrCmpnMstIf*/ UPDATE MSP_INTM_INSR_CMPN_MST_IF SET CTN = '00000000000', CUST_NM = '해지고객' WHERE INSR_MNGM_NO IN ( SELECT INSR_MNGM_NO FROM MSP_INTM_INSR_MEMBER WHERE INSR_STAT_CD = '2' AND CTN != '00000000000' AND TRUNC(SYSDATE) - #{stdrCnt} > TRUNC(TO_DATE(END_DTTM, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS')) )
mapper.insert: /*transferMapper.insertMcpSelfSmsAuth*/ INSERT INTO NMCP_SELF_SMS_AUTH@DL_CAN ( SELF_SMS_AUTH_SEQ, REQUEST_KEY, REQ_SEQ, RES_SEQ, AUTH_TYPE , NAME, BIRTH_DATE, GENDER, NATIONAL_INFO , DUP_INFO, CONN_INFO, PARAM_R3, N_REFERER, RIP , MOBILE_NO, MOBILE_CO, AUTH_TIME, HPC_STAT, FST_HPC_RST , FST_HPC_RMK, FST_HPC_USR_ID, FST_HPC_DTTM, SND_HPC_RST, SND_HPC_RMK , SND_HPC_USR_ID, SND_HPC_DTTM, THD_HPC_RST, THD_HPC_RMK, THD_HPC_USR_ID , THD_HPC_DTTM, HPC_RST, RVISN_ID, RVISN_DTTM, SYS_RDATE ) SELECT SELF_SMS_AUTH_SEQ, REQUEST_KEY, REQ_SEQ, RES_SEQ, AUTH_TYPE , NAME, BIRTH_DATE, GENDER, NATIONAL_INFO , DUP_INFO, CONN_INFO, PARAM_R3, N_REFERER, RIP , MOBILE_NO, MOBILE_CO, AUTH_TIME, HPC_STAT, FST_HPC_RST , FST_HPC_RMK, FST_HPC_USR_ID, FST_HPC_DTTM, SND_HPC_RST, SND_HPC_RMK , SND_HPC_USR_ID, SND_HPC_DTTM, THD_HPC_RST, THD_HPC_RMK, THD_HPC_USR_ID , THD_HPC_DTTM, HPC_RST, RVISN_ID, RVISN_DTTM, SYS_RDATE FROM NMCP_SELF_SMS_AUTH@DL_MCP WHERE REQUEST_KEY = #{requestKey}
mapper.update: /*tranferMapper.updateMcpSelfSmsAuth*/ UPDATE NMCP_SELF_SMS_AUTH@DL_MCP SET NAME = '이관고객' , MOBILE_NO = '00000000000' , BIRTH_DATE = '' , CONN_INFO = '' , RIP = '' WHERE REQUEST_KEY = #{requestKey}
mapper.insert: /*transferMapper.insertMdsTossOrder*/ INSERT INTO MDS_TOSS_ORDER@DL_CAN ( TOSS_ORDER_SEQ, FILE_NM, MVNO_ORDER_NO, OSST_ORDER_NO, TR_TIME , TRNO, REQ_TEL_NO, NICE_CERT_KEY, ODER_TYPE_CD, MNP_STATUS , STATUS, CUST_TYPE, MYSL_ATHN_TYPE_CD, CNTPNT_CD, EML_ADRS_NM , RQSSHT_PPRFRM_CD, BCHNG_NP_COMM_CMPN_CD, ATHN_ITEM_CD, ATHN_SBST, BLPYM_MTHD_CD , CRDT_CARD_EXPR_DATE, CRDT_CARD_KIND_CD, BANK_CD, BLPYM_MTHD_IDNT_NO, REGST_DTTM , RCP_CR_YN ) SELECT TOSS_ORDER_SEQ, FILE_NM, MVNO_ORDER_NO, OSST_ORDER_NO, TR_TIME , TRNO, REQ_TEL_NO, NICE_CERT_KEY, ODER_TYPE_CD, MNP_STATUS , STATUS, CUST_TYPE, MYSL_ATHN_TYPE_CD, CNTPNT_CD, EML_ADRS_NM , RQSSHT_PPRFRM_CD, BCHNG_NP_COMM_CMPN_CD, ATHN_ITEM_CD, ATHN_SBST, BLPYM_MTHD_CD , CRDT_CARD_EXPR_DATE, CRDT_CARD_KIND_CD, BANK_CD, BLPYM_MTHD_IDNT_NO, REGST_DTTM , RCP_CR_YN FROM MDS_TOSS_ORDER A WHERE REQ_TEL_NO = #{subscriberNo} AND RCP_CR_YN = 'Y' AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM MDS_TOSS_ORDER@DL_CAN WHERE TOSS_ORDER_SEQ = A.TOSS_ORDER_SEQ )
mapper.update: /*tranferMapper.updateMdsTossOrder*/ UPDATE MDS_TOSS_ORDER SET REQ_TEL_NO = '00000000000' , NICE_CERT_KEY = '' , EML_ADRS_NM = '' , BLPYM_MTHD_IDNT_NO = '' WHERE REQ_TEL_NO = #{subscriberNo} AND RCP_CR_YN = 'Y'
mapper.insert: /*transferMapper.insertMdsOsstOrder*/ INSERT INTO MDS_OSST_ORDER@DL_CAN ( OSST_ORDER_SEQ, FILE_NM, MVNO_ORDER_NO, OSST_ORDER_NO, TR_TIME , TRNO, REQ_TEL_NO, NICE_CERT_KEY, ODER_TYPE_CD, MNP_STATUS , STATUS, CUST_TYPE, MYSL_ATHN_TYPE_CD, CNTPNT_CD, EML_ADRS_NM , RQSSHT_PPRFRM_CD, BCHNG_NP_COMM_CMPN_CD, ATHN_ITEM_CD, ATHN_SBST, BLPYM_MTHD_CD , CRDT_CARD_EXPR_DATE, CRDT_CARD_KIND_CD, BANK_CD, BLPYM_MTHD_IDNT_NO, CHANNEL_CD , ACCESS_IND_CD, BILL_ACC_ID, RCP_CR_YN, SIM_DIV_CD, MOTLI_RQSSHT_PPRFRM_CD , MOTLI_SVC_NO, WATCH_TYPE_CD, CLNT_IP ) SELECT OSST_ORDER_SEQ, FILE_NM, MVNO_ORDER_NO, OSST_ORDER_NO, TR_TIME , TRNO, REQ_TEL_NO, NICE_CERT_KEY, ODER_TYPE_CD, MNP_STATUS , STATUS, CUST_TYPE, MYSL_ATHN_TYPE_CD, CNTPNT_CD, EML_ADRS_NM , RQSSHT_PPRFRM_CD, BCHNG_NP_COMM_CMPN_CD, ATHN_ITEM_CD, ATHN_SBST, BLPYM_MTHD_CD , CRDT_CARD_EXPR_DATE, CRDT_CARD_KIND_CD, BANK_CD, BLPYM_MTHD_IDNT_NO, CHANNEL_CD , ACCESS_IND_CD, BILL_ACC_ID, RCP_CR_YN, SIM_DIV_CD, MOTLI_RQSSHT_PPRFRM_CD , MOTLI_SVC_NO, WATCH_TYPE_CD, CLNT_IP FROM MDS_OSST_ORDER A WHERE REQ_TEL_NO = #{subscriberNo} AND RCP_CR_YN = 'Y' AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM MDS_OSST_ORDER@DL_CAN WHERE OSST_ORDER_SEQ = A.OSST_ORDER_SEQ )
mapper.update: /*tranferMapper.updateMdsOsstOrder*/ UPDATE MDS_OSST_ORDER SET REQ_TEL_NO = '00000000000' , NICE_CERT_KEY = '' , EML_ADRS_NM = '' , BLPYM_MTHD_IDNT_NO = '' , MOTLI_SVC_NO = '00000000000' , CLNT_IP = '' WHERE REQ_TEL_NO = #{subscriberNo} AND RCP_CR_YN = 'Y'
mapper.insert: /*transferMapper.insertMdsShinhanProdSbsc*/ INSERT INTO MDS_SHINHAN_PROD_SBSC@DL_CAN ( SHINHAN_PROD_SEQ, FILE_NM, REC_TYPE, SHINHAN_PROD_NO, CI , SVC_CNTR_NO, RATE_CD, RATE_NM, RATE_REGST_DTTM, SUBSCRIBER_NO , MEMO ) SELECT SHINHAN_PROD_SEQ, FILE_NM, REC_TYPE, SHINHAN_PROD_NO, CI , SVC_CNTR_NO, RATE_CD, RATE_NM, RATE_REGST_DTTM, SUBSCRIBER_NO , MEMO FROM MDS_SHINHAN_PROD_SBSC WHERE SVC_CNTR_NO = #{svcCntrNo}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM MDS_TOSS_ORDER WHERE REQ_TEL_NO = #{subscriberNo} AND RCP_CR_YN = 'Y'
DELETE FROM MDS_TOSS_ORDER@DL_CAN WHERE REQ_TEL_NO = #{subscriberNo} AND RCP_CR_YN = 'Y'
DELETE FROM MDS_OSST_ORDER WHERE REQ_TEL_NO = #{subscriberNo} AND RCP_CR_YN = 'Y'
DELETE FROM MDS_OSST_ORDER@DL_CAN WHERE REQ_TEL_NO = #{subscriberNo} AND RCP_CR_YN = 'Y'
mapper.insert: /*transferMapper.insertCanIntmInsrIfOut*/ INSERT INTO MSP_INTM_INSR_IF_OUT@DL_CAN ( INSR_OUT_NUM, INSR_MEMBER_NUM, CONTRACT_NUM, INSR_PROD_CD, STRT_DTTM, END_DTTM, INSR_STAT_CD, CHN_CD, INSR_EVNT_CD, OPEN_DT, INSR_CMPN_CD, CTN,CUST_NM, BIRTH_DT, BAN_ADDR, MINOR_AGENT_NAME, MODEL_NM, INTM_SRL_NO, OLD_YN, PRDT_LNCH_DT, OUT_UNIT_PRIC, CLAUSE_FLAG, CUST_TYPE, REGST_ID, REGST_DTTM, PROC_YN, PROC_DT ) SELECT INSR_OUT_NUM, INSR_MEMBER_NUM, CONTRACT_NUM, INSR_PROD_CD, STRT_DTTM, END_DTTM, INSR_STAT_CD, CHN_CD, INSR_EVNT_CD, OPEN_DT, INSR_CMPN_CD, CTN,CUST_NM, BIRTH_DT, BAN_ADDR, MINOR_AGENT_NAME, MODEL_NM, INTM_SRL_NO, OLD_YN, PRDT_LNCH_DT, OUT_UNIT_PRIC, CLAUSE_FLAG, CUST_TYPE, REGST_ID, REGST_DTTM, PROC_YN, PROC_DT FROM MSP_INTM_INSR_IF_OUT WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = #{contractNum}

/*transferMapper.insertCanIntmInsrCmpnMstIf*/ INSERT INTO MSP_INTM_INSR_CMPN_MST_IF@DL_CAN ( INSR_CMPN_NUM, IF_DT, IF_CD, INSR_MNGM_NO, CONTRACT_NUM, INSR_CMPN_CD, ACDNT_NO, CUST_NM, CTN, OPEN_DT, JOIN_DT, INSR_PROD_CD, ACDNT_REG_DT, ACDNT_DT, CMPN_CNFM_DT, MODEL_NM, INTM_SRL_NO, OUT_UNIT_PRIC, ACDNT_TP, CMPN_LMT_AMT, CMPN_ACML_AMT, RMN_CMPN_AMT, RCPT_AMT, CUST_BRDN_AMT, REAL_CMPN_AMT, RMN_CMPN_LMT_AMT, BANK_NM, ACNT_NO, DPST_NM, CMPN_MODEL_NM, CMPN_MODEL_COLOR, CMPN_CTN, OVER_AMT, USIM_AMT, PAY_TYPE, REGST_ID, REGST_DTTM ) SELECT INSR_CMPN_NUM, IF_DT, IF_CD, INSR_MNGM_NO, CONTRACT_NUM, INSR_CMPN_CD, ACDNT_NO, CUST_NM, CTN, OPEN_DT, JOIN_DT, INSR_PROD_CD, ACDNT_REG_DT, ACDNT_DT, CMPN_CNFM_DT, MODEL_NM, INTM_SRL_NO, OUT_UNIT_PRIC, ACDNT_TP, CMPN_LMT_AMT, CMPN_ACML_AMT, RMN_CMPN_AMT, RCPT_AMT, CUST_BRDN_AMT, REAL_CMPN_AMT, RMN_CMPN_LMT_AMT, BANK_NM, ACNT_NO, DPST_NM, CMPN_MODEL_NM, CMPN_MODEL_COLOR, CMPN_CTN, OVER_AMT, USIM_AMT, PAY_TYPE, REGST_ID, REGST_DTTM FROM MSP_INTM_INSR_CMPN_MST_IF WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = #{contractNum}

/*transferMapper.insertCanIntmInsrOrder*/ INSERT INTO MSP_INTM_INSR_ORDER@DL_CAN ( CONTRACT_NUM, INSR_PROD_CD, STRT_DTTM, END_DTTM, IF_TRGT_CD, INSR_STAT_CD, CHN_CD, INSR_EVNT_CD, REQ_BUY_TYPE, DVC_CHG_DT, OPEN_DT, MODEL_NM, MODEL_ID, INTM_SRL_NO, CLAUSE_FLAG, IMG_CHK_YN, VRFY_RSLT_CD, FST_VRFY_DTTM, FST_VRFY_ID, SND_VRFY_DTTM, SND_VRFY_ID, RMK, REGST_ID, REGST_DTTM, RVISN_ID, RVISN_DTTM, REQ_IN_DAY ) SELECT CONTRACT_NUM, INSR_PROD_CD, STRT_DTTM, END_DTTM, IF_TRGT_CD, INSR_STAT_CD, CHN_CD, INSR_EVNT_CD, REQ_BUY_TYPE, DVC_CHG_DT, OPEN_DT, MODEL_NM, MODEL_ID, INTM_SRL_NO, CLAUSE_FLAG, IMG_CHK_YN, VRFY_RSLT_CD, FST_VRFY_DTTM, FST_VRFY_ID, SND_VRFY_DTTM, SND_VRFY_ID, RMK, REGST_ID, REGST_DTTM, RVISN_ID, RVISN_DTTM, REQ_IN_DAY FROM MSP_INTM_INSR_ORDER WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = #{contractNum}

/*transferMapper.insertCanIntmInsrMember*/ INSERT INTO MSP_INTM_INSR_MEMBER@DL_CAN ( INSR_MEMBER_NUM, CONTRACT_NUM, INSR_PROD_CD, STRT_DTTM, END_DTTM, INSR_STAT_CD, CHN_CD, INSR_EVNT_CD, OPEN_DT, CTN, CUST_NM, BIRTH_DT, MODEL_NM, MODEL_ID, INTM_SRL_NO, OLD_YN, PRDT_LNCH_DT, OUT_UNIT_PRIC, INSR_MNGM_NO, RMN_CMPN_AMT, CLAUSE_FLAG, CAN_RSLT_CD, REGST_ID, REGST_DTTM, RVISN_ID, RVISN_DTTM, REQ_IN_DAY ) SELECT INSR_MEMBER_NUM, CONTRACT_NUM, INSR_PROD_CD, STRT_DTTM, END_DTTM, INSR_STAT_CD, CHN_CD, INSR_EVNT_CD, OPEN_DT, CTN, CUST_NM, BIRTH_DT, MODEL_NM, MODEL_ID, INTM_SRL_NO, OLD_YN, PRDT_LNCH_DT, OUT_UNIT_PRIC, INSR_MNGM_NO, RMN_CMPN_AMT, CLAUSE_FLAG, CAN_RSLT_CD, REGST_ID, REGST_DTTM, RVISN_ID, RVISN_DTTM, REQ_IN_DAY FROM MSP_INTM_INSR_MEMBER WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = #{contractNum}

/*transferMapper.insertCanIntmInsrCmpnDtl*/ INSERT INTO MSP_INTM_INSR_CMPN_DTL@DL_CAN ( INSR_CMPN_NUM, INSR_MEMBER_NUM, CMPN_CTN, PAY_TYPE, PAY_AMT, PAY_YN, PAY_DTTM, VAC_BANK_CD, VAC_ID, RES_NO, REGST_ID, REGST_DTTM, RVISN_ID, RVISN_DTTM ) SELECT INSR_CMPN_NUM, INSR_MEMBER_NUM, CMPN_CTN, PAY_TYPE, PAY_AMT, PAY_YN, PAY_DTTM, VAC_BANK_CD, VAC_ID, RES_NO, REGST_ID, REGST_DTTM, RVISN_ID, RVISN_DTTM FROM MSP_INTM_INSR_CMPN_DTL WHERE INSR_MEMBER_NUM IN ( SELECT INSR_MEMBER_NUM FROM MSP_INTM_INSR_MEMBER WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = #{contractNum} )

/*transferMapper.insertCanIntmInsrCanInfo*/ INSERT INTO MSP_INTM_INSR_CAN_INFO@DL_CAN ( INSR_CAN_NUM, CONTRACT_NUM, INSR_PROD_CD, STRT_DTTM, END_DTTM, NCN, CTN, CUST_ID, CAN_RSLT_CD, RSLT_CD, RSLT_MSG, REGST_ID, REGST_DTTM, PROC_YN, PROC_DT ) SELECT INSR_CAN_NUM, CONTRACT_NUM, INSR_PROD_CD, STRT_DTTM, END_DTTM, NCN, CTN, CUST_ID, CAN_RSLT_CD, RSLT_CD, RSLT_MSG, REGST_ID, REGST_DTTM, PROC_YN, PROC_DT FROM MSP_INTM_INSR_CAN_INFO WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = #{contractNum}
mapper.update: /*transferMapper.updateMspIntmInsrCmpnMstIf*/ UPDATE MSP_INTM_INSR_CMPN_MST_IF SET CTN = '00000000000' , CUST_NM = '이관고객' , ACNT_NO = LPAD('*',LENGTH(ACNT_NO),'*') , DPST_NM = DECODE(DPST_NM, NULL, NULL, '이관고객') , CMPN_CTN = DECODE(CMPN_CTN, NULL, NULL, '00000000000') WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = #{contractNum}
mapper.insert: /*transferMapper.insertMcpRequestDtlCan*/ INSERT INTO MCP_REQUEST_DTL@DL_CAN ( REQUEST_KEY, CSTMR_NAME, CSTMR_MOBILE, BIRTH_DT ,CSTMR_GENDER_STR ,SOC_CODE ,MOVE_COMPANY ,MOVE_MOBILE ,MODEL_ID ,SPRT_TP ,CSTMR_ADDR ,CSTMR_ADDR_DTL ,CSTMR_TEL ,DLVRY_TYPE ,DLVRY_ADDR ,DLVRY_ADDR_DTL ,DLVRY_POST ,DLVRY_MOBILE ,DLVRY_MEMO ,RECOMMEND_FLAG_CD ,RECOMMEND_INFO ) SELECT REQUEST_KEY, CSTMR_NAME, CSTMR_MOBILE, BIRTH_DT ,CSTMR_GENDER_STR ,SOC_CODE ,MOVE_COMPANY ,MOVE_MOBILE ,MODEL_ID ,SPRT_TP ,CSTMR_ADDR ,CSTMR_ADDR_DTL ,CSTMR_TEL ,DLVRY_TYPE ,DLVRY_ADDR ,DLVRY_ADDR_DTL ,DLVRY_POST ,DLVRY_MOBILE ,DLVRY_MEMO ,RECOMMEND_FLAG_CD ,RECOMMEND_INFO FROM MCP_REQUEST_DTL@DL_MCP WHERE REQUEST_KEY = #{requestKey}

/*transferMapper.insertMspJuoCusInfo*/ INSERT INTO NMCP_FREE_USIM_REQ_MST@DL_CAN ( SEQ, CUSTOMER_ID, CHNL_CD, REQ_QNTY, DLVRY_NAME, DLVRY_TEL_FN, DLVRY_TEL_MN, DLVRY_TEL_RN, DLVRY_POST, DLVRY_ADDR, DLVRY_ADDR_DTL, DLVRY_MEMO, AGRM_YN, ONLINE_AUTH_INFO, TB_CD, DLVRY_NO, STATUS, PROC_YN, PROC_MEMO, PROC_DTTM, REQ_IN_DAY, CRET_ID, CRET_DTTM, AMD_ID, AMD_DTTM, TRNS_YN ) SELECT SEQ, CUSTOMER_ID, CHNL_CD, REQ_QNTY, DLVRY_NAME, DLVRY_TEL_FN, DLVRY_TEL_MN, DLVRY_TEL_RN, DLVRY_POST, DLVRY_ADDR, DLVRY_ADDR_DTL, DLVRY_MEMO, AGRM_YN, ONLINE_AUTH_INFO, TB_CD, DLVRY_NO, STATUS, PROC_YN, PROC_MEMO, PROC_DTTM, REQ_IN_DAY, CRET_ID, CRET_DTTM, AMD_ID, AMD_DTTM, TRNS_YN FROM NMCP_FREE_USIM_REQ_MST@DL_MCP A WHERE CUSTOMER_ID = #{customerId} AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM NMCP_FREE_USIM_REQ_MST@DL_CAN WHERE CUSTOMER_ID = A.CUSTOMER_ID )
mapper.update: /*tranferMapper.updateNmcpFreeUsimReqMst*/ UPDATE NMCP_FREE_USIM_REQ_MST@DL_MCP SET DLVRY_NAME = CASE WHEN DLVRY_NAME IS NOT NULL THEN '이관고객' ELSE '' END , DLVRY_TEL_FN = CASE WHEN DLVRY_TEL_FN IS NOT NULL THEN '000' ELSE '' END , DLVRY_TEL_MN = CASE WHEN DLVRY_TEL_MN IS NOT NULL THEN '0000' ELSE '' END , DLVRY_TEL_RN = CASE WHEN DLVRY_TEL_RN IS NOT NULL THEN '0000' ELSE '' END , DLVRY_ADDR = SUBSTR(DLVRY_ADDR,1,15) , DLVRY_ADDR_DTL = '' , TRNS_YN = 'Y' WHERE CUSTOMER_ID = #{customerId}
mapper.insert: /*transferMapper.insertCanGiftVocMgmt*/ INSERT INTO MSP_GIFT_VOC_MGMT@DL_CAN ( GIFT_VOC_SEQ, CONTRACT_NUM, CUST_NM, PROM_NM, GIFT_TYPE , GIFT_AMT, VOC_STAT, VOC_CTN, DIVISN, RMK , VOC_MNG_ORGN, VOC_TYPE, VOC_REQ_DT, USER_ID, RECOMM_ID , RECOMM_CONTRACT_NUM, EXTNL_ORGN_REF_YN, VOC_DESC, REGST_DTTM, REGST_ID , RVISN_DTTM, RVISN_ID, ANS_PROC_DTTM, ANS_PROC_ID, ANS_RMK , ANS_PAY_RSN, ANS_PAY_ITEM, ANS_PAY_AMT, ANS_PAY_PLAN_MON, ANS_STAT ) SELECT GIFT_VOC_SEQ, CONTRACT_NUM, CUST_NM, PROM_NM, GIFT_TYPE , GIFT_AMT, VOC_STAT, VOC_CTN, DIVISN, RMK , VOC_MNG_ORGN, VOC_TYPE, VOC_REQ_DT, USER_ID, RECOMM_ID , RECOMM_CONTRACT_NUM, EXTNL_ORGN_REF_YN, VOC_DESC, REGST_DTTM, REGST_ID , RVISN_DTTM, RVISN_ID, ANS_PROC_DTTM, ANS_PROC_ID, ANS_RMK , ANS_PAY_RSN, ANS_PAY_ITEM, ANS_PAY_AMT, ANS_PAY_PLAN_MON, ANS_STAT FROM MSP_GIFT_VOC_MGMT WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = #{contractNum}

/*transferMapper.insertCanGiftPayStat*/ INSERT INTO MSP_GIFT_PAY_STAT@DL_CAN ( GIFT_PAY_STAT_SEQ, PAY_MON, CONTRACT_NUM, CUST_NM, CTN , TAX_RPLY_YN, PROM_NM, GIFT_TYPE, GIFT_AMT, REGST_DTTM , REGST_ID ) SELECT GIFT_PAY_STAT_SEQ, PAY_MON, CONTRACT_NUM, CUST_NM, CTN , TAX_RPLY_YN, PROM_NM, GIFT_TYPE, GIFT_AMT, REGST_DTTM , REGST_ID FROM MSP_GIFT_PAY_STAT WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = #{contractNum}
